response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year minimum experience requirement and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and hands-on engineering skills, his background aligns more with a Staff-level full-stack developer than a Director-level AI strategist. He lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic enterprise customer advisory experience critical for this Principal role.
strengths: Over 15 years of versatile software engineering experience across various stacks
Entrepreneurial background as a founder and active open-source contributor
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies
concerns: Lacks the required Director-level strategic leadership and enterprise customer advisory experience
AI expertise is recent and implementation-focused rather than deep, recognized strategic mastery
Profile is highly tactical ('software craftsman') rather than focused on high-level cloud and AI platform strategy
